U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails with a query related to "NorthWind" or "Raj Patel" or "Denver expansion" (or similar) using search_emails to find Pam Kowalski's relocation request (email_pam_denver_relocation_request) detailing Raj Patel's server lab move, including 4 rack-mounted servers, approximately 2,400 lbs, lithium UPS batteries, and Victor Huang's chain-of-custody requirements.
OE 2: Search emails with a query related to "Victor Huang" or "security requirements" or "chain-of-custody" (or similar) using search_emails to find Victor Huang's formal CISO requirements email (email_victor_ciso_security_requirements) specifying 5 conditions: encryption verification, supervised loading by NorthWind IT escort, direct transport, signed chain-of-custody log, and real-time GPS tracking.
OE 3: Search emails with a query related to "NorthWind Denver" or "chain-of-custody" or "account recovery" (or similar) using search_emails to find Catalina's internal email to David Chen (email_catalina_david_northwind_update) flagging the chain-of-custody protocol as unprecedented, confirming no template exists, and framing this as an account recovery after NorthWind's 5/10 Q1 CSAT.
OE 4: Search Slack with a query related to "NorthWind" or "chain-of-custody" or "Raj Patel" (or similar) using conversations_search_messages to find Catalina's message in #operations (C006, ts: 1775853480) flagging the NorthWind Denver moves and asking Chloe about Swift's capabilities and custody template availability.
OE 5: Read the #operations thread using conversations_replies (channel_id: "C006", thread_ts: "1775853480.000000") to find Chloe's assessment (ts: 1775858880), which notes that Swift can handle hazmat/weight but chain-of-custody is completely new, no template exists, GPS tracking is open, and she needs to call Greg Pallone at Swift. Blessing Okafor is assigned as coordinator.
OE 6: Search Slack with a query related to "NorthWind" or "account recovery" or "CSAT" (or similar) using conversations_search_messages to find Catalina's team update in #customer-engagement (C002, ts: 1775876280) framing NorthWind as a high-stakes account recovery after their 5/10 Q1 survey.
OE 7: Read the #customer-engagement thread using conversations_replies (channel_id: "C002", thread_ts: "1775876280.000000") to find David Chen's reply (ts: 1775882580) calling this the most important account recovery, recommending enhanced SLA, and advising the chain-of-custody template be drafted this week.
OE 8: Search Airtable with a query related to "Raj Patel" (or similar) using airtable_search_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Name", value: "Raj Patel") or airtable_list_records to find recRajPatelChicagoDenver, which shows Status as In Progress, Move Start as 2026-04-21, Coordinator as Blessing Okafor, along with chain-of-custody, GPS, hazmat, and escort requirements.
OE 9: Search Linear with a query related to "Raj Patel" or "NorthWind" or "chain-of-custody" (or similar) using linear_list_issues, finding issue_dot_docs_patel_northwind (DOT Docs for Raj Patel / NorthWind, number: 3, state: done, P2) but no chain-of-custody template ticket, thus confirming one needs to be created.
OE 10: Search CRM for NorthWind using crm_search_companies (name: "NorthWind") to find company_northwind (NorthWind Technologies, Manufacturing Tech, 150 employees, Chicago) for subsequent deal and engagement lookups.
OE 11: Search CRM deals using crm_search_deals (dealname: "NorthWind" or company_id: "company_northwind") to find deal_northwind_denver_expansion_v2 with amount: $14,700, dealstage: contractSent, and closedate: 2026-04-23.
OE 12: Search CRM engagements using crm_list_engagements (company_ids: ["company_northwind"]) to find eng_northwind_denver_recovery_context documenting NorthWind's Q1 failures (5/10 CSAT, 4/10 communication), Pam's escalation to David, and the Denver expansion as a second-chance opportunity.
OE 13: Look up Greg Pallone's contact using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Greg Pallone" or "Swift") to find greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com (contact_vendor_swift, National Account Manager at Swift Relocations), who is needed to send the confirmation request.
OE 14: Look up Victor Huang's contact using crm_search_contacts (full_name: "Victor Huang") to find victor.huang@northwindtech.com (contact_victor_huang, CISO). Note: Victor exists only in CRM contacts and not in the standard contacts directory.
OE 15: List Slack channels using channels_list (channel_types: "public_channel") to discover the #operations (C006) channel ID for posting the readiness summary.
OE 16: Send confirmation request to Swift using send_email (sender: "chloe.vance@moveops.com", recipients: ["greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com"]) requesting formal confirmation of supervised loading under NorthWind IT escort, chain-of-custody logging, direct transport, and GPS tracking sharing for the April 21 Raj Patel server lab move.
OE 17: Create a Linear issue for the chain-of-custody template using linear_create_issue (team: "Operations", title covering chain-of-custody document template for Raj Patel / NorthWind, description covering signed handoff log, handler ID, timestamps, server serial numbers, and dual signatures).
OE 18: Update the Raj Patel Airtable record using airtable_update_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_id: "tblRelocations01", record: recRajPatelChicagoDenver) with current status on each requirement, including Swift confirmation pending, custody template drafting, GPS tracking pending, and DOT docs complete.
OE 19: Post a readiness summary in #operations using conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C006") covering Swift confirmation status, custody template progress, GPS tracking status, DOT docs completion, and remaining open items before the April 21 move.
OE 20: Send Victor Huang a status email using send_email (sender: "chloe.vance@moveops.com", recipients: ["victor.huang@northwindtech.com"]) updating him on Swift confirmation status, chain-of-custody template progress (which will be sent for his review before the move), and GPS tracking setup. Sonnet 4.6ExtendedClaude is AI and can make mistakes. Please double-check responses.

outcome

6 The email to [greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com](mailto:greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com) requests confirmation that a NorthWind IT security escort will be present during loading.
outcome
